credits: Uistilrao sector was designed by Joshua Bell. Stellar positions were developed by Joe D. Fugate Sr. and appear in The MegaTraveller Alien, Volume 2: Solomani & Aslan (Digest Group Publications, 1991).

allegiances.AsMw: Aslan Hierate, single multiple-world clan dominates
allegiances.AsSc: Aslan Hierate, multiple clans split control
allegiances.AsT0: Aslan Hierate, Tlaukhu control, Yerlyaruiwo (1), Hrawoao (13), Eisohiyw (14), Ferekhearl (19)
allegiances.AsT3: Aslan Hierate, Tlaukhu control, Tralyeaeawi (4), Yulraleh (12), Aiheilar (25), Riyhalaei (28)
allegiances.AsT4: Aslan Hierate, Tlaukhu control, Eakhtiyho (5), Eteawyolei' (11), Fteweyeakh (23)
allegiances.AsT5: Aslan Hierate, Tlaukhu control, Hlyueawi (6), Isoitiyro (15)
allegiances.AsT6: Aslan Hierate, Tlaukhu control, Uiktawa (7), Iykyasea (17), Faowaou (27)
allegiances.AsT7: Aslan Hierate, Tlaukhu control, Ikhtealyo (8), Tlerlearlyo (20), Yetahikh (24)
allegiances.AsT8: Aslan Hierate, Tlaukhu control, Seieakh (9), Akatoiloh (18), We'okurir (29)
allegiances.AsT9: Aslan Hierate, Tlaukhu control, Aokhalte (10), Sahao' (21), Ouokhoi (26)
allegiances.AsTv: Aslan Hierate, Tlaukhu vassal clan dominates
allegiances.AsWc: Aslan Hierate, single one-world clan dominates
